candidate_name: Auxiliary Supervision Sensitivity and Alignment Probe

checkpoint_lifecycle.No-Go: delete or treat checkpoints as recyclable after summaries/logs are preserved
checkpoint_lifecycle.Feasible-A_or_Feasible-B: retain temporarily for review; no test export until separate confirmatory manifest

go_rule.minimum: best primary val Macro-F1 and Accuracy must not be below deterministic_train_l0
go_rule.control_moat: best primary must beat the best static/control variant on Macro-F1 and Accuracy
go_rule.support: support metrics should not indicate pure calibration or telemetry-only gain
go_rule.promotion: Feasible-A requires roughly +0.3pp Macro-F1 and Accuracy over deterministic_train_l0; Feasible-B may be smaller but must clear controls

no_go_rule: best primary matched or beaten by best static/control variant
known_limitations: GradNorm/DWA controls are not implemented in the current PANDA runner; this smoke uses implemented generic PCGrad/CAGrad plus same-budget, detached, random-label, shuffled-label, static-weight, and random-sign controls.
This manifest authorizes only seed42 train/val smoke, not three-seed validation and not confirmatory test.
